zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Brooke於大約1391年出生在英國多瑟特時，他的父親Thomas de Brooke II36歲，母親Johanna Hanham34歲。他於1416年2月20日與Joan Braybrooke在英國肯特可巴姆結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1438年2月12日之後，埋葬在英國戴文可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Brooke于大约1391年出生在英国多瑟特时，他的父亲Thomas de Brooke II36岁，母亲Johanna Hanham34岁。他于1416年2月20日与Joan Braybrooke在英国肯特可巴姆结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1438年2月12日之后，埋葬在英国戴文可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Brooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Brook  , which preserves a trace of the Old English dative singular case, originally used after a preposition (e.g. ‘at the brook’).

History: In 1650, Robert and Mary Mainwaring Brooke brought ten children and a number of servants with them from England to MD, where Robert became governor. Although the fourteen known contemporary Brooke immigrants in VA included Robert's brothers Richard and Humphrey, the relationships of the others are unknown. Brooke family memorials remain in the Anglican church at Whitchurch, Hampshire, England.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Brooke was born about 1391, in Dorset, England, his father, Thomas de Brooke II, was 36 and his mother, Johanna Hanham, was 34. He married Joan Braybrooke on 20 February 1416, in Cobham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. He died after 12 February 1438, and was buried in Thorncombe, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Brooke est né environ 1391, à Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Brooke II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Johanna Hanham, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Joan Braybrooke le 20 février 1416, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé après 12 février 1438, et a été enterré à Thorncombe, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Brooke um 1391 in Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Brooke II 36 und seine Mutter Johanna Hanham 34. Er hat am 20. Februar 1416 in Cobham, Kent, England Joan Braybrooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb nach 12. Februar 1438 und wurde in Thorncombe, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Brooke è nato il circa 1391 nel Dorset, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Brooke II, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Hanham, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Joan Braybrooke il 20 febbraio 1416, nel Cobham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 12 febbraio 1438, e fu sepolto a Thorncombe, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Brookeが約1391年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父Thomas de Brooke IIは36歳，母Johanna Hanhamは34歳であった。1416年2月20日にイギリスケントコブハムでJoan Braybrookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1438年2月12日以後に死去し，イギリスデボンソルンコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Brooke(이)가 대략 1391년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Brooke II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Hanham(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1416년 2월 20일 영국 켄트 컵함에서 Joan Braybrooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 2월 12일 이후 사망했으며 영국 데폰 토른코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Brooke nasceu aproximadamente 1391, em Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Brooke II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Hanham, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Braybrooke em 20 de fevereiro de 1416, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu após 12 de fevereiro de 1438, e foi sepultado em Thorncombe, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Brooke родился около 1391 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Brooke II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Hanham, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Braybrooke 20 февраля 1416 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер после 12 февраль 1438 г. и был похоронен в местности таурнкомб, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Brooke nació aproximadamente 1391, en Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Brooke II, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Johanna Hanham, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Joan Braybrooke el 20 de febrero de 1416, en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 12 de febrero de 1438, y fue sepultado en Thorncombe, Devon, Inglaterra.
